text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse wonder what they
can do to help Ms. Kashimoto recover from her
past trauma and shock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their solution is to exceed Ms. Kashimoto's
expectations for them, even if it means
disregarding her warnings and training to the
point of recklessness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their goal is not only to help Ms. Kashimoto but
to also protect their team and the space they've
found for themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when Ms. Kashimoto realizes that her racers
are slipping out of her grasp and defying her, she
feels like she's failed as a trainer again.
